name: app.R
content:
# beLab-edu — R コード生成アシスタント # # 学生は GUI で操作 → 生成された R コードをコピー → Colab に貼って実行． # 「ボタンを押すと R 構文が見える」ことが学習の核． # # Deploy via shinylive: # shinylive::export("inst/edu", "docs/edu") # → docs/edu/ を GitHub Pages にアップ → 学生は単一 URL でアクセス # # Lightweight deps: shiny, bslib, ggplot2, dplyr, DT （shinylive 50MB 内） suppressPackageStartupMessages({ library(shiny); library(bslib); library(ggplot2); library(dplyr); library(DT) }) # ---- Built-in datasets for teaching --------------------------------------- # Small synthetic survey dataset matching the lecture-style column structure # (性別 / 居住エリア / 利用頻度 / 年齢) — useful for クロス集計 and t-test 演習. .make_survey_demo <- function() { set.seed(42) n <- 240 sex <- sample(c("男性", "女性"), n, replace = TRUE, prob = c(0.48, 0.52)) area <- sample(c("都市部", "郊外", "地方"), n, replace = TRUE, prob = c(0.45, 0.35, 0.20)) # 性別と「スーパー利用頻度」に弱い関連を入れる super_freq <- vapply(sex, function(s) if (s == "女性") sample(c("高頻度","中頻度","低頻度"), 1, prob = c(0.50, 0.32, 0.18)) else sample(c("高頻度","中頻度","低頻度"), 1, prob = c(0.30, 0.40, 0.30)), character(1)) conv_freq <- sample(c("高頻度","中頻度","低頻度"), n, replace = TRUE, prob = c(0.35, 0.40, 0.25)) age <- sample(20:69, n, replace = TRUE) spend <- round(rnorm(n, mean = ifelse(super_freq == "高頻度", 25000, ifelse(super_freq == "中頻度", 18000, 10000)), sd = 5000)) data.frame(性別 = sex, 居住エリア = area, スーパー利用 = super_freq, コンビニ利用 = conv_freq, 年齢 = age, 月額食費 = spend, stringsAsFactors = FALSE) } edu_datasets <- list( "survey (アンケート)" = .make_survey_demo(), "iris (アヤメ)" = iris, "mtcars (車)" = mtcars, "airquality (大気)" = airquality, "diamonds (先頭1000行)" = ggplot2::diamonds[1:1000, ] ) # ---- Helpers -------------------------------------------------------------- # Keep an accumulator of generated R code across the session # Plain HTML button (NOT actionButton) — Shiny would overwrite onclick. # Clicking copies the rendered 
 contents to clipboard via Clipboard API.
copy_btn <- function(target_id) {
  tags$button(
    type = "button",
    class = "btn btn-sm btn-outline-primary",
    onclick = sprintf(
      paste0("var el=document.getElementById('%s');",
             "var t=el?(el.innerText||el.textContent):'';",
             "navigator.clipboard.writeText(t).then(",
             "function(){var b=event.target;var orig=b.innerText;",
             "b.innerText='✓ コピー済み';",
             "setTimeout(function(){b.innerText=orig;},1500);})"),
      target_id),
    HTML("\U0001F4CB コピー"))
}

code_card <- function(header, code_id, helper_text = NULL) {
  card(
    card_header(
      div(style = "display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;",
        span(strong("R コード — "), header),
        copy_btn(code_id)
      )
    ),
    if (!is.null(helper_text)) p(class = "small text-muted", helper_text),
    verbatimTextOutput(code_id)
  )
}

# ---- intro.js (CDN) — guided tutorials ------------------------------------
tour_head <- tags$head(
  tags$link(rel = "stylesheet",
    href = "https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/intro.js@7.2.0/minified/introjs.min.css"),
  tags$script(
    src = "https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/intro.js@7.2.0/minified/intro.min.js"),
  tags$script(HTML(
'Shiny.addCustomMessageHandler("startTour", function(config) {
  var steps = config.steps || [];
  // Resolve a CSS selector like "#ds" to its visible container.
  // Shiny\'s selectInput hides the , the
    // dropdown menu will open below it. Put the tooltip on the right so it
    // doesn\'t overlap with the option list.
    if (resolved && resolved.querySelector && resolved.querySelector("select")) {
      o.position = s.position || "right";
    } else if (s.position) {
      o.position = s.position;
    }
    return o;
  });
  intro.setOptions({
    steps: introSteps,
    nextLabel: "次へ →", prevLabel: "← 戻る",
    skipLabel: "✕", doneLabel: "完了",
    showStepNumbers: true, showProgress: true, scrollToElement: true,
    overlayOpacity: 0.5, exitOnOverlayClick: false,
    tooltipClass: "belab-tour",
    // Prefer right & top over bottom — bottom would cover dropdowns and preview
    positionPrecedence: ["right", "top", "left", "bottom"]
  });
  intro.onbeforechange(function() {
    var i = intro._currentStep, step = steps[i];
    if (step && step.tab) {
      return selectTab(step.tab).then(function() {
        // After tab switch, re-resolve the element in case the widget was
        // re-rendered (selectize re-mounts on tab activation in some cases).
        if (step.element) {
          var resolved = resolveElement(step.element);
          if (resolved) intro._introItems[i].element = resolved;
        }
      });
    }
  });
  // Defer start so Shiny finishes processing any queued input/tab messages
  // (updateRadioButtons, nav_select) before intro.js measures the first element.
  setTimeout(function() { intro.start(); }, 280);
});')),
  tags$style(HTML(
"  .belab-tour { min-width: 360px; max-width: 520px; }
   .belab-tour .introjs-tooltiptext { font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.6; }
   .introjs-helperLayer { box-shadow: 0 0 0 1000px rgba(0,0,0,0.5),
                                       0 0 6px 2px #EB77CB inset !important; }
   .introjs-button { font-size: 13px; padding: 6px 12px; }

   /* Ensure selectize/native dropdown menus float ABOVE the intro overlay
      so students can actually click the options.  intro.js helperLayer is
      9999998; we lift dropdowns above that. */
   .selectize-dropdown,
   .selectize-control.single .selectize-dropdown,
   .dropdown-menu.show          { z-index: 99999999 !important; }
   /* When a step highlights a select, give the whole input container some
      breathing room so the tooltip arrow doesn\'t sit on top of the widget. */
   .introjs-showElement .selectize-control { z-index: 99999999 !important; }
"))
)

# ---- UI -------------------------------------------------------------------
ui <- page_navbar(
  id = "main_nav",
  title = "beLab-edu — R コード生成アシスタント",
  theme = bs_theme(version = 5, bootswatch = "flatly",
                    primary = "#1976D2", "navbar-bg" = "#EB77CB"),
  fillable = TRUE,
  header = tour_head,

  # ---- ① Data -----------------------------------------------------------
  nav_panel("① データ", value = "tab_data",
    layout_sidebar(sidebar = sidebar(width = 340,
      h4("データを読み込む"),
      radioButtons("data_source", "データの取り方",
        choices = c("組込みデータ（iris など）"   = "builtin",
                    "CSV ファイルをアップロード"  = "csv_upload",
                    "URL から CSV"                 = "csv_url",
                    "Google ドライブから（Colab 用）" = "csv_drive"),
        selected = "builtin"),
      conditionalPanel("input.data_source == 'builtin'",
        selectInput("ds", "組込みデータ",
          choices = names(edu_datasets))),
      conditionalPanel("input.data_source == 'csv_upload'",
        fileInput("csv_file", "CSV ファイルを選択",
                  accept = c(".csv","text/csv","text/plain"),
                  buttonLabel = "ファイル選択",
                  placeholder = "未選択"),
        numericInput("csv_skip",
                      "ヘッダーより前にスキップする行数 (SSDSE は 1)",
                      value = 0, min = 0, max = 10, step = 1),
        helpText("文字化けする場合は，UTF-8 → CP932 → Shift-JIS の順で",
                  "自動的に試します．")),
      conditionalPanel("input.data_source == 'csv_url'",
        textInput("csv_url",  "CSV の URL",
                  value = "https://example.com/data.csv"),
        actionButton("fetch_url", "URL から読込（プレビュー用）",
                     class = "btn-sm btn-primary"))),
      code_card("データ読込", "code_data",
        "ここに表示される R コードを Colab に貼り付ければ，同じデータが読み込める．"),
      card(card_header("読み込んだデータ（プレビュー）"),
        textOutput("data_summary"),
        DTOutput("preview")))),

  # ---- ② Wrangle --------------------------------------------------------
  nav_panel("② 整形", value = "tab_wrangle",
    layout_sidebar(sidebar = sidebar(width = 340,
      h4("整形（dplyr）"),
      helpText("操作を選ぶと R コードが下に出る．"),
      accordion(open = "基本操作",
        accordion_panel("基本操作",
          checkboxGroupInput("wrangle_ops",
            "実行する操作（複数可・上から順に適用）",
            choices = c("filter（条件で行抽出）"        = "filter",
                        "select（列を選ぶ）"             = "select",
                        "mutate（新しい列を作る）"       = "mutate",
                        "group_by + summarise（集計）"    = "groupby",
                        "arrange（並べ替え）"             = "arrange",
                        "case_when（条件分岐）"           = "casewhen")),
          conditionalPanel("input.wrangle_ops.includes('filter')",
            textInput("filter_expr", "filter 条件",
              value = "Sepal.Length > 5")),
          conditionalPanel("input.wrangle_ops.includes('select')",
            textInput("select_cols", "残す列（カンマ区切り）",
              value = "Sepal.Length, Petal.Length, Species")),
          conditionalPanel("input.wrangle_ops.includes('mutate')",
            textInput("mutate_expr", "mutate 式",
              value = "ratio = Sepal.Length / Petal.Length")),
          conditionalPanel("input.wrangle_ops.includes('groupby')",
            textInput("groupby_var", "group_by の変数",
              value = "Species"),
            textInput("summarise_expr", "summarise の中身",
              value = "mean = mean(Sepal.Length), n = n()")),
          conditionalPanel("input.wrangle_ops.includes('arrange')",
            textInput("arrange_expr", "arrange の中身",
              value = "desc(Sepal.Length)"))),
        accordion_panel("結合 join (第9講)",
          helpText("2 つのデータフレームをキーで結合する．",
                    "Colab で 2 つの df を持っている前提のコードを生成．"),
          checkboxInput("wrangle_join_on", "join のコードを生成", FALSE),
          conditionalPanel("input.wrangle_join_on == true",
            selectInput("join_type", "結合の種類",
              choices = c("left_join (左を残す・右をくっつける)" = "left",
                          "inner_join (両方にあるキーだけ)"        = "inner",
                          "full_join (両方の和集合)"               = "full",
                          "right_join (右を残す)"                   = "right",
                          "anti_join (左にあって右にないキー)"     = "anti",
                          "semi_join (左にあって右にもあるキー)"   = "semi")),
            textInput("join_left_df",  "左のデータ (R 側の変数名)",
                       value = "df"),
            textInput("join_right_df", "右のデータ (R 側の変数名)",
                       value = "df2"),
            textInput("join_by",
                       "by = ?（キーの列名．複数なら c(\"a\",\"b\")）",
                       value = "\"都道府県\""))),
        accordion_panel("\U0001F4DD 演習テンプレ",
          helpText("講義の演習問題でよく出るパターンをワンクリックで．",
                    "チェックを入れると下のコードに追加されます．"),
          checkboxInput("tpl_age_band",
            HTML("年代を作る (case_when・第4講 Q5 風)"), FALSE),
          checkboxInput("tpl_freq_cat",
            HTML("頻度を 3 カテゴリ化 (高/中/低・第6講 Q1 風)"), FALSE),
          conditionalPanel("input.tpl_freq_cat == true",
            textInput("tpl_freq_col", "対象列 (1〜10 の数値)",
                       value = "Q4_3")),
          checkboxInput("tpl_imc_rate",
            HTML("IMC 正答率の計算 (rowwise・第13講)"), FALSE),
          checkboxInput("tpl_dictator_cat",
            HTML("寄付額を 3 カテゴリ化 (第14講 Q1)"), FALSE),
          conditionalPanel("input.tpl_dictator_cat == true",
            textInput("tpl_give_col", "寄付額の列",
                       value = "dictator.1.player.give"))))),
      code_card("整形", "code_wrangle",
        "df を上書きしないので元データは保持される．"))),

  # ---- ③ Descriptive ----------------------------------------------------
  nav_panel("③ 記述統計", value = "tab_desc",
    layout_sidebar(sidebar = sidebar(width = 320,
      h4("記述統計"),
      selectInput("dv_desc", "変数（数値）",   choices = NULL),
      selectInput("grp_desc", "群分け（任意）", choices = NULL),
      checkboxGroupInput("desc_stats", "計算する統計量",
        choices = c("平均 mean"   = "mean",
                    "標準偏差 sd" = "sd",
                    "中央値 median" = "median",
                    "最小 / 最大"   = "minmax",
                    "四分位（Q1/Q3）"   = "quart",
                    "件数 n"        = "n"),
        selected = c("mean", "sd", "n")),
      checkboxInput("desc_zscore",
        HTML("z スコア (scale) も計算 (第2講 Q5)"), FALSE)),
      code_card("記述統計", "code_desc"),
      card(card_header("プレビュー（GUI 内）"),
        DTOutput("desc_preview")))),

  # ---- ④ Visualize ------------------------------------------------------
  nav_panel("④ 可視化", value = "tab_viz",
    layout_sidebar(sidebar = sidebar(width = 360,
      h4("可視化（ggplot2）"),
      accordion(open = c("グラフ種別","美的属性 (aes)"),
        accordion_panel("グラフ種別",
          selectInput("geom", "プロット種別",
            choices = c(
              "散布図 (geom_point)"               = "point",
              "ジッター散布 (geom_jitter)"          = "jitter",
              "棒・度数 (geom_bar)"                = "bar",
              "棒・集計値 (geom_col)"              = "col",
              "ヒストグラム (geom_histogram)"      = "histogram",
              "頻度ポリゴン (geom_freqpoly)"       = "freqpoly",
              "箱ひげ (geom_boxplot)"             = "boxplot",
              "箱ひげ＋点 (boxplot + jitter)"      = "box_jitter",
              "バイオリン (geom_violin)"           = "violin",
              "バイオリン＋箱ひげ"                  = "violin_box",
              "密度 (geom_density)"                = "density",
              "二次元密度 (geom_density_2d)"       = "density2d",
              "折れ線 (geom_line)"                 = "line",
              "面 (geom_area)"                     = "area",
              "ステップ (geom_step)"               = "step",
              "ヒートマップ (geom_tile)"           = "tile",
              "Q-Q プロット (stat_qq)"             = "qq"))),
        accordion_panel("美的属性 (aes)",
          selectInput("aes_x", "X 軸",                 choices = NULL),
          selectInput("aes_y", "Y 軸（任意）",          choices = NULL),
          selectInput("aes_color", "色分け colour（任意）", choices = NULL),
          selectInput("aes_fill",  "塗り fill（任意）",     choices = NULL),
          sliderInput("alpha", "透明度 alpha",
                       min = 0.1, max = 1, value = 0.7, step = 0.1),
          sliderInput("point_size", "点のサイズ",
                       min = 0.5, max = 5, value = 2, step = 0.5)),
        accordion_panel("回帰直線・統計量",
          checkboxInput("add_smooth", "回帰直線を重ねる（散布図など）", FALSE),
          selectInput("smooth_method", "回帰の方法",
            choices = c("lm（直線）"           = "lm",
                        "loess（曲線・小〜中）" = "loess",
                        "gam（曲線・大規模）"   = "gam"),
            selected = "lm"),
          checkboxInput("smooth_se", "信頼区間バンド", TRUE),
          checkboxInput("add_mean_point",
                         "平均点を重ねる (stat_summary)", FALSE),
          checkboxInput("add_errorbar",
                         "エラーバー（mean ± SE）", FALSE)),
        accordion_panel("ファセット（小窓分割）",
          selectInput("facet_var", "facet_wrap で分割する列（任意）",
                       choices = NULL),
          numericInput("facet_ncol", "列数", value = 2, min = 1, max = 6),
          checkboxInput("facet_free", "y 軸を独立スケール (scales=\"free_y\")",
                         FALSE)),
        accordion_panel("ラベル・軸",
          textInput("plot_title",    "タイトル",          ""),
          textInput("plot_subtitle", "サブタイトル",       ""),
          textInput("plot_xlab",     "X 軸ラベル（空なら自動）", ""),
          textInput("plot_ylab",     "Y 軸ラベル（空なら自動）", ""),
          checkboxInput("log_x", "X 軸を対数 (log10)", FALSE),
          checkboxInput("log_y", "Y 軸を対数 (log10)", FALSE),
          checkboxInput("flip_coord", "縦横反転 coord_flip", FALSE)),
        accordion_panel("見た目",
          selectInput("theme_choice", "テーマ",
            choices = c("minimal","classic","bw","light","dark","void","grey"),
            selected = "minimal"),
          selectInput("palette", "カラーパレット",
            choices = c("デフォルト"            = "default",
                        "Set1（質的・濃）"       = "Set1",
                        "Set2（質的・淡）"       = "Set2",
                        "Dark2（質的・暗）"      = "Dark2",
                        "Paired（質的・対）"     = "Paired",
                        "Viridis（連続・色覚配慮）" = "viridis",
                        "Magma（連続）"          = "magma",
                        "Plasma（連続）"         = "plasma"),
            selected = "default"),
          selectInput("legend_pos", "凡例の位置",
            choices = c("right","top","bottom","left","none"),
            selected = "right")))),
      code_card("可視化", "code_viz"),
      card(full_screen = TRUE, card_header("プレビュー（GUI 内）"),
        plotOutput("viz_preview", height = "450px")))),

  # ---- ⑤ Crosstab -------------------------------------------------------
  nav_panel("⑤ クロス集計", value = "tab_ct",
    layout_sidebar(sidebar = sidebar(width = 320,
      h4("クロス集計"),
      selectInput("ct_row", "行変数（カテゴリ）", choices = NULL),
      selectInput("ct_col", "列変数（カテゴリ）", choices = NULL),
      checkboxInput("ct_addmargins", "addmargins（合計行・列）", TRUE),
      selectInput("ct_prop", "比率",
        choices = c("行ごと (margin=1)" = "row",
                    "列ごと (margin=2)" = "col",
                    "全体 (全合計に対する比率)" = "total",
                    "比率なし"                     = "none"),
        selected = "row"),
      checkboxInput("ct_chisq", "カイ二乗検定 chisq.test", TRUE),
      checkboxInput("ct_cramer",
                     "クラメールの V（連関の強さ 0-1）", TRUE)),
      code_card("クロス集計", "code_ct"),
      card(card_header("プレビュー（度数表）"),
        verbatimTextOutput("ct_preview")))),

  # ---- ⑥ Correlation ----------------------------------------------------
  nav_panel("⑥ 相関", value = "tab_cor",
    layout_sidebar(sidebar = sidebar(width = 320,
      h4("相関と散布図"),
      selectInput("cor_x", "X（変数1）", choices = NULL),
      selectInput("cor_y", "Y（変数2）", choices = NULL),
      selectInput("cor_method", "方法",
        choices = c("Pearson（線形）"    = "pearson",
                    "Spearman（順位）"  = "spearman",
                    "Kendall (τ)"      = "kendall")),
      checkboxInput("cor_test", "cor.test も実行", TRUE),
      checkboxInput("cor_scatter", "散布図も生成", TRUE),
      checkboxInput("cor_smooth_in_plot", "散布図に回帰直線", TRUE),
      hr(),
      h6("演習テンプレ"),
      checkboxInput("cor_filter_on",
        HTML("外れ値除外 (filter してから cor.test)"), FALSE),
      conditionalPanel("input.cor_filter_on == true",
        textInput("cor_filter_expr",
                   "除外する条件 (例: 都道府県 != \"東京都\")",
                   value = "都道府県 != \"東京都\"")),
      checkboxInput("cor_matrix_on",
        HTML("相関行列 (3 つ以上の変数・第7講 Q5)"), FALSE),
      conditionalPanel("input.cor_matrix_on == true",
        textInput("cor_matrix_vars",
                   "変数（カンマ区切り）",
                   value = "Q4_1, Q4_2, Q4_3, Q4_4, Q4_5"))),
      code_card("相関", "code_cor"),
      card(card_header("プレビュー（GUI 内）"),
        plotOutput("cor_preview", height = "350px")))),

  # ---- ⑦ Regression ----------------------------------------------------
  nav_panel("⑦ 回帰分析", value = "tab_lm",
    layout_sidebar(sidebar = sidebar(width = 320,
      h4("線形回帰 lm"),
      selectInput("lm_dv", "従属変数 Y", choices = NULL),
      selectizeInput("lm_iv", "独立変数 X (複数可)",
                      choices = NULL, multiple = TRUE),
      checkboxInput("lm_inter", "交互作用 (X1 * X2)", FALSE),
      checkboxGroupInput("lm_extras", "追加の出力",
        choices = c("summary（係数表）"      = "summary",
                    "confint（95% 信頼区間）" = "confint",
                    "anova（分散分析表）"    = "anova",
                    "残差プロット"             = "resid"),
        selected = c("summary", "confint")),
      hr(),
      h6("演習テンプレ"),
      checkboxInput("lm_log",
        HTML("log 変換 log(Y) ~ log(X) (第10講 Q2)"), FALSE),
      checkboxInput("lm_predict",
        HTML("predict() で新しい値を予測 (第10講 Q3)"), FALSE),
      conditionalPanel("input.lm_predict == true",
        textInput("lm_predict_vals",
                   "予測したい X の値（カンマ区切り）",
                   value = "2000000, 10000000"))),
      code_card("線形回帰", "code_lm"),
      card(card_header("プレビュー（GUI 内）"),
        verbatimTextOutput("lm_preview")))),

  # ---- ⑧ t-test --------------------------------------------------------
  nav_panel("⑧ t 検定", value = "tab_tt",
    layout_sidebar(sidebar = sidebar(width = 320,
      h4("t 検定 / Wilcoxon"),
      selectInput("tt_design", "デザイン",
        choices = c("二群（独立）" = "two_sample",
                    "対応のある"   = "paired",
                    "1 標本"        = "one_sample"),
        selected = "two_sample"),
      selectInput("tt_dv", "従属変数（数値）", choices = NULL),
      selectInput("tt_group", "群分け列（2 群）", choices = NULL),
      numericInput("tt_mu", "μ₀（1 標本のみ）", 0),
      checkboxInput("tt_var_equal", "等分散仮定（外すと Welch）", FALSE),
      checkboxGroupInput("tt_extras", "追加",
        choices = c("Cohen's d（効果量）"  = "d",
                    "Wilcoxon ノンパラ代替" = "wilcox"),
        selected = c("d"))),
      code_card("t 検定", "code_tt"),
      card(card_header("プレビュー（GUI 内）"),
        verbatimTextOutput("tt_preview")))),

  # ---- ⑨ Help ----------------------------------------------------------
  nav_panel("ℹ️ 使い方", value = "tab_help",
    card(card_header("beLab-edu の使い方"),
      div(class = "small",

           align = "right",

        tour_link("tour_desc",   "\U0001F4CA 第2講: 記述統計の基本"),

# ---- Server ---------------------------------------------------------------
server <- function(input, output, session) {

  rv <- reactiveValues(
    df = iris,                # current data for preview & selectors
    df_name = "iris",         # used in generated code (builtin name or "df")
    csv_filename = NULL,      # uploaded file name (for code generation)
    csv_encoding = "UTF-8",   # detected encoding of uploaded CSV
    csv_skip = 0L             # rows to skip (for SSDSE-style multi-row headers)
  )

  # Robust CSV reader: tries UTF-8 → CP932 → Shift_JIS → EUC-JP, strips BOM,
  # tolerates incomplete-final-line warning.
  read_csv_robust <- function(path, fname = "uploaded.csv", skip = 0) {
    if (!file.exists(path) || file.size(path) == 0)
      return(list(error = sprintf("'%s' が空または読めません．", fname)))

    encs <- c("UTF-8", "CP932", "Shift_JIS", "EUC-JP")
    errors <- character()
    for (enc in encs) {
      df <- tryCatch(
        suppressWarnings(
          utils::read.csv(path,
                          fileEncoding = enc,
                          stringsAsFactors = FALSE,
                          check.names = FALSE,
                          skip = skip)),
        error = function(e) {
          errors <<- c(errors, sprintf("%s: %s", enc, conditionMessage(e)))
          NULL
        })
      if (is.null(df) || nrow(df) == 0 || ncol(df) == 0) {
        if (!length(errors) || !grepl(enc, tail(errors, 1)))
          errors <- c(errors, sprintf("%s: 空または不正な構造", enc))
        next
      }
      # Strip UTF-8 BOM if present in the first column name
      if (length(names(df)) > 0) {
        names(df)[1] <- sub("^﻿", "", names(df)[1])
        names(df)[1] <- sub("^\xef\xbb\xbf", "", names(df)[1], useBytes = TRUE)
      }
      # Heuristic mojibake check: column names containing many replacement chars
      n_bad <- sum(grepl("�||", names(df)))
      if (n_bad > ncol(df) / 2) {
        errors <- c(errors, sprintf("%s: 列名が文字化け（%d/%d）",
                                     enc, n_bad, ncol(df)))
        next
      }
      return(list(df = df, encoding = enc))
    }
    list(error = paste("どのエンコーディングでも読めませんでした：",
                        paste(errors, collapse = " ／ ")))
  }

  # ----- Data load: drive rv$df from the chosen source ------------------
  observeEvent(input$data_source, {
    if (input$data_source == "builtin") {
      rv$df <- edu_datasets[[input$ds %||% names(edu_datasets)[1]]]
      rv$df_name <- sub(" .*", "", input$ds %||% "iris")
    }
  })

  observeEvent(input$ds, {
    if (isTRUE(input$data_source == "builtin")) {
      rv$df <- edu_datasets[[input$ds]]
      rv$df_name <- sub(" .*", "", input$ds)
    }
  })

  observeEvent(input$csv_file, {
    f <- input$csv_file
    res <- read_csv_robust(f$datapath, fname = f$name,
                            skip = input$csv_skip %||% 0)
    if (!is.null(res$error)) {
      showNotification(sprintf("CSV 読込失敗: %s", res$error),
                       type = "error", duration = 10)
      return()
    }
    rv$df <- res$df
    rv$df_name <- "df"
    rv$csv_filename <- f$name
    rv$csv_encoding <- res$encoding
    enc_msg <- if (res$encoding == "UTF-8") "" else
                 sprintf("（自動検出: %s）", res$encoding)
    showNotification(sprintf("✓ %s を読込（%d 行 × %d 列）%s",
                              f$name, nrow(res$df), ncol(res$df), enc_msg),
                      type = "message", duration = 5)
  })

  observeEvent(input$fetch_url, {
    req(input$csv_url)
    df <- tryCatch(
      utils::read.csv(input$csv_url, fileEncoding = "UTF-8",
                      stringsAsFactors = FALSE),
      error = function(e) {
        showNotification(sprintf("URL 読込失敗: %s", conditionMessage(e)),
                         type = "error", duration = 5); NULL
      })
    if (!is.null(df)) {
      rv$df <- df
      rv$df_name <- "df"
      showNotification(sprintf("✓ URL から %d 行を読込",
                                nrow(df)), type = "message")
    }
  })

  output$data_summary <- renderText({
    req(rv$df)
    sprintf("%d 行 × %d 列  ／  列名: %s",
            nrow(rv$df), ncol(rv$df),
            paste(head(names(rv$df), 10), collapse = ", "))
  })

  # Update selectors based on current preview data
  observe({
    req(rv$df)
    cols <- names(rv$df)
    num <- cols[sapply(rv$df, is.numeric)]
    if (!length(num)) num <- cols
    for (id in c("dv_desc","cor_x","cor_y","lm_dv","tt_dv"))
      updateSelectInput(session, id, choices = num)
    for (id in c("grp_desc","aes_x","aes_y","aes_color","aes_fill",
                  "cor_color","facet_var"))
      updateSelectInput(session, id, choices = c("(なし)" = "", cols))
    for (id in c("ct_row","ct_col","tt_group"))
      updateSelectInput(session, id, choices = cols)
    updateSelectizeInput(session, "lm_iv", choices = cols)
  })

  output$preview <- renderDT({
    req(rv$df)
    datatable(head(rv$df, 50), options = list(scrollX = TRUE))
  })

  # =========================================================================
  # Code generation per tab — each is a reactive returning R code as text
  # =========================================================================

  code_data <- reactive({
    src <- input$data_source %||% "builtin"
    switch(src,
      builtin = sprintf("# 組込みデータを使用\ndf <- %s\nhead(df)\nstr(df)",
                        rv$df_name),
      csv_upload = {
        fn  <- rv$csv_filename %||% "data.csv"
        enc <- rv$csv_encoding %||% "UTF-8"
        skp <- input$csv_skip %||% 0
        skip_arg <- if (skp > 0) sprintf(", skip = %d", skp) else ""
        sprintf(
"# CSV ファイル読込（Colab では先にファイルをアップロード）
# 左サイドバーのフォルダアイコンから %s をアップロード
df <- read.csv(\"%s\", fileEncoding = \"%s\"%s)
head(df)
str(df)",
          fn, fn, enc, skip_arg)
      },
      csv_url = sprintf(
"# URL から CSV を直接読み込む
df <- read.csv(\"%s\", fileEncoding = \"UTF-8\")
head(df)
str(df)", input$csv_url %||% "https://example.com/data.csv"),
      csv_drive =
"# Google ドライブをマウントしてから CSV 読込（Colab 専用）
# 1. Colab の左サイドバーで Drive をマウント
# 2. ファイルパスを指定
df <- read.csv(\"/content/drive/MyDrive/your_folder/data.csv\",
               fileEncoding = \"UTF-8\")
head(df)
str(df)")
  })
  output$code_data <- renderText(code_data())

  code_wrangle <- reactive({
    ops <- input$wrangle_ops %||% character(0)
    join_on <- isTRUE(input$wrangle_join_on)
    tpls_on <- any(c(isTRUE(input$tpl_age_band),
                      isTRUE(input$tpl_freq_cat),
                      isTRUE(input$tpl_imc_rate),
                      isTRUE(input$tpl_dictator_cat)))
    if (!length(ops) && !join_on && !tpls_on)
      return("# 操作を 1 つ以上選ぶ／joinチェック／演習テンプレを選択")
    out <- character()

    # ----- 基本操作のパイプチェーン --------------------------------
    if (length(ops)) {
      lines <- c("library(dplyr)", "", "df_new <- df |>")
      pipe_lines <- character()
      if ("filter" %in% ops)
        pipe_lines <- c(pipe_lines, sprintf("  filter(%s)",
          input$filter_expr %||% "TRUE"))
      if ("select" %in% ops)
        pipe_lines <- c(pipe_lines, sprintf("  select(%s)",
          input$select_cols %||% "everything()"))
      if ("mutate" %in% ops)
        pipe_lines <- c(pipe_lines, sprintf("  mutate(%s)",
          input$mutate_expr %||% "new = 1"))
      if ("groupby" %in% ops)
        pipe_lines <- c(pipe_lines,
          sprintf("  group_by(%s)", input$groupby_var %||% "Species"),
          sprintf("  summarise(%s, .groups = \"drop\")",
                   input$summarise_expr %||% "mean = mean(value)"))
      if ("arrange" %in% ops)
        pipe_lines <- c(pipe_lines, sprintf("  arrange(%s)",
          input$arrange_expr %||% "desc(value)"))
      if ("casewhen" %in% ops)
        pipe_lines <- c(pipe_lines,
          "  mutate(category = case_when(",
          "    value < 5  ~ \"低\",",
          "    value < 10 ~ \"中\",",
          "    TRUE       ~ \"高\"",
          "  ))")
      if (length(pipe_lines))
        pipe_lines[-length(pipe_lines)] <- paste0(pipe_lines[-length(pipe_lines)], " |>")
      out <- c(out, lines, pipe_lines, "", "head(df_new)")
    }

    # ----- join (第9講) -------------------------------------------
    if (join_on) {
      jt <- input$join_type %||% "left"
      ldf <- input$join_left_df  %||% "df"
      rdf <- input$join_right_df %||% "df2"
      by  <- input$join_by       %||% "\"都道府県\""
      jfn <- switch(jt,
        left = "left_join", inner = "inner_join", full = "full_join",
        right = "right_join", anti = "anti_join", semi = "semi_join")
      explain <- switch(jt,
        left = "左 (%s) を残し，キーが一致する行で右 (%s) の列を追加",
        inner = "両方にキーがある行のみ残す",
        full = "両方の行をすべて残す（無い側は NA）",
        right = "右 (%s) を残し，キーが一致する行で左 (%s) の列を追加",
        anti = "左にあって右にないキーの行だけ抽出（差分確認に便利）",
        semi = "左にあって右にもあるキーの行だけ（フィルタ用途）")
      if (length(out)) out <- c(out, "", "# ---- 結合 (第9講) ----")
      else out <- c(out, "library(dplyr)", "")
      explain_filled <- if (grepl("%s", explain))
        suppressWarnings(sprintf(explain, ldf, rdf)) else explain
      out <- c(out,
        sprintf("# %s", explain_filled),
        sprintf("df_joined <- %s(%s, %s, by = %s)",
                 jfn, ldf, rdf, by),
        "head(df_joined)")
    }

    # ----- 演習テンプレ ------------------------------------------
    if (tpls_on) {
      if (!length(out)) out <- c(out, "library(dplyr)")
      out <- c(out, "", "# ===== 演習テンプレ =====")

      if (isTRUE(input$tpl_age_band)) {
        out <- c(out, "",
          "# 年代を作る (第4講 Q5 風)",
          "df <- df %>%",
          "  mutate(年代 = case_when(",
          "    Q24 < 20 ~ \"10代\",",
          "    Q24 < 30 ~ \"20代\",",
          "    Q24 < 40 ~ \"30代\",",
          "    Q24 < 50 ~ \"40代\",",
          "    Q24 < 60 ~ \"50代\",",
          "    Q24 >= 60 ~ \"60代以上\",",
          "    TRUE     ~ NA_character_",
          "  ))")
      }

      if (isTRUE(input$tpl_freq_cat)) {
        col <- input$tpl_freq_col %||% "Q4_3"
        out <- c(out, "",
          sprintf("# %s を 3 カテゴリ化 (1-3=高, 4-6=中, 7-10=低・第6講 Q1)", col),
          "df <- df %>%",
          sprintf("  mutate(%s_cat = case_when(", col),
          sprintf("    %s <= 3 ~ \"高頻度（週2回以上）\",", col),
          sprintf("    %s <= 6 ~ \"中頻度（月数回程度）\",", col),
          sprintf("    %s <= 10 ~ \"低頻度・利用しない\",", col),
          "    TRUE       ~ NA_character_",
          "  ))")
      }

      if (isTRUE(input$tpl_imc_rate)) {
        out <- c(out, "",
          "# IMC 正答率の計算 (第13講)",
          "# rowwise() で 1 行ずつ処理 → c_across() で 15 列の合計",
          "imc_vars <- grep(\"^imc\\\\.1\\\\.player\\\\.imc\", names(df),",
          "                  value = TRUE)",
          "df_imc <- df %>%",
          "  rowwise() %>%",
          "  mutate(",
          "    imc_correct = sum(c_across(all_of(imc_vars)), na.rm = TRUE),",
          "    imc_rate    = imc_correct / length(imc_vars)",
          "  ) %>%",
          "  ungroup() %>%",
          "  mutate(グループ = ifelse(session.config.introjs == 1,",
          "                            \"処置群\", \"対照群\"))",
          "summary(df_imc$imc_rate)")
      }

      if (isTRUE(input$tpl_dictator_cat)) {
        col <- input$tpl_give_col %||% "dictator.1.player.give"
        out <- c(out, "",
          "# 寄付額を 3 カテゴリ化 (第14講 Q1)",
          "df_dict <- df %>%",
          sprintf("  filter(!is.na(%s)) %%>%%", col),
          "  mutate(",
          sprintf("    寄付額 = %s,", col),
          "    寄付カテゴリ = case_when(",
          "      寄付額 == 0    ~ \"0 ポイント（全額自分）\",",
          "      寄付額 <  500  ~ \"1〜499 ポイント（一部）\",",
          "      寄付額 >= 500  ~ \"500 以上（半分以上）\",",
          "      TRUE           ~ NA_character_",
          "    ),",
          "    グループ = ifelse(session.config.introjs == 1,",
          "                       \"処置群\", \"対照群\")",
          "  )",
          "table(df_dict$寄付カテゴリ, df_dict$グループ)")
      }
    }
    paste(out, collapse = "\n")
  })
  output$code_wrangle <- renderText(code_wrangle())

  code_desc <- reactive({
    dv <- input$dv_desc; grp <- input$grp_desc
    stats <- input$desc_stats %||% c("mean", "sd", "n")
    if (!nzchar(dv %||% "")) return("# 変数を選んでください")
    pieces <- character()
    for (s in stats) {
      pieces <- c(pieces, switch(s,
        mean   = sprintf("mean = mean(%s, na.rm = TRUE)", dv),
        sd     = sprintf("sd = sd(%s, na.rm = TRUE)", dv),
        median = sprintf("median = median(%s, na.rm = TRUE)", dv),
        minmax = sprintf("min = min(%s, na.rm = TRUE),\n            max = max(%s, na.rm = TRUE)", dv, dv),
        quart  = sprintf("q1 = quantile(%s, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),\n            q3 = quantile(%s, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE)", dv, dv),
        n      = sprintf("n = sum(!is.na(%s))", dv)))
    }
    summarise_body <- paste(pieces, collapse = ",\n            ")
    main <- if (nzchar(grp %||% "")) {
      sprintf(
"library(dplyr)

df |>
  group_by(%s) |>
  summarise(%s,
            .groups = \"drop\")",
        grp, summarise_body)
    } else {
      sprintf(
"library(dplyr)

df |>
  summarise(%s)",
        summarise_body)
    }
    if (isTRUE(input$desc_zscore)) {
      z_block <- sprintf(
"\n\n# z スコア (標準化・第2講 §3)
# 平均 0・標準偏差 1 にスケール．外れ値の判定や複数尺度の比較に使う．
df <- df |>
  mutate(%s_z = as.numeric(scale(%s)))
summary(df$%s_z)", dv, dv, dv)
      paste0(main, z_block)
    } else main
  })
  output$code_desc <- renderText(code_desc())

  output$desc_preview <- renderDT({
    req(rv$df, input$dv_desc)
    df <- rv$df
    if (nzchar(input$grp_desc) && input$grp_desc %in% names(df)) {
      tab <- df |> group_by(.data[[input$grp_desc]]) |>
        summarise(mean = mean(.data[[input$dv_desc]], na.rm = TRUE),
                  sd = sd(.data[[input$dv_desc]], na.rm = TRUE),
                  n = sum(!is.na(.data[[input$dv_desc]])),
                  .groups = "drop")
    } else {
      x <- df[[input$dv_desc]]
      tab <- data.frame(mean = mean(x, na.rm = TRUE),
                         sd = sd(x, na.rm = TRUE),
                         n = sum(!is.na(x)))
    }
    datatable(tab |> mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(.x, 3))),
      rownames = FALSE, options = list(dom = "t"))
  })

  code_viz <- reactive({
    if (!nzchar(input$aes_x %||% ""))
      return("# X 軸の変数を選んでください")

    # ---- aes() の中身 -------------------------------------------------
    aes_parts <- sprintf("x = %s", input$aes_x)
    if (nzchar(input$aes_y %||% ""))
      aes_parts <- c(aes_parts, sprintf("y = %s", input$aes_y))
    if (nzchar(input$aes_color %||% ""))
      aes_parts <- c(aes_parts, sprintf("colour = %s", input$aes_color))
    if (nzchar(input$aes_fill %||% ""))
      aes_parts <- c(aes_parts, sprintf("fill = %s", input$aes_fill))

    # ---- geom_*() への引数 -------------------------------------------
    a    <- input$alpha %||% 0.7
    psz  <- input$point_size %||% 2
    point_args <- function(extra = NULL)
      paste(c(sprintf("alpha = %g", a), sprintf("size = %g", psz),
               extra), collapse = ", ")

    # geom_*() のレイヤ（複数行可）
    geom_layers <- switch(input$geom,
      point     = sprintf("  geom_point(%s)", point_args()),
      jitter    = sprintf("  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, height = 0, %s)", point_args()),
      bar       = sprintf("  geom_bar(alpha = %g)", a),
      col       = sprintf("  geom_col(alpha = %g)", a),
      histogram = sprintf("  geom_histogram(bins = 30, alpha = %g)", a),
      freqpoly  = "  geom_freqpoly(bins = 30)",
      boxplot   = sprintf("  geom_boxplot(alpha = %g)", a),
      box_jitter = c(
        "  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA)",
        sprintf("  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, height = 0, %s)", point_args())),
      violin    = sprintf("  geom_violin(alpha = %g)", a),
      violin_box = c(
        sprintf("  geom_violin(alpha = %g)", a),
        "  geom_boxplot(width = 0.15, alpha = 0.6, outlier.shape = NA)"),
      density   = sprintf("  geom_density(alpha = %g)", a),
      density2d = "  geom_density_2d()",
      line      = "  geom_line()",
      area      = sprintf("  geom_area(alpha = %g)", a),
      step      = "  geom_step()",
      tile      = sprintf("  geom_tile(alpha = %g)", a),
      qq        = c("  stat_qq()", "  stat_qq_line()")
    )

    # ---- 平滑化 -------------------------------------------------------
    if (isTRUE(input$add_smooth) &&
         input$geom %in% c("point","jitter")) {
      geom_layers <- c(geom_layers,
        sprintf("  geom_smooth(method = \"%s\", se = %s)",
                 input$smooth_method %||% "lm",
                 if (isTRUE(input$smooth_se)) "TRUE" else "FALSE"))
    }
    if (isTRUE(input$add_mean_point))
      geom_layers <- c(geom_layers,
        "  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = \"point\", size = 3, shape = 18)")
    if (isTRUE(input$add_errorbar))
      geom_layers <- c(geom_layers,
        "  stat_summary(fun.data = mean_se, geom = \"errorbar\", width = 0.2)")

    # ---- ファセット ---------------------------------------------------
    if (nzchar(input$facet_var %||% ""))
      geom_layers <- c(geom_layers,
        sprintf("  facet_wrap(~ %s, ncol = %d%s)",
                 input$facet_var,
                 input$facet_ncol %||% 2,
                 if (isTRUE(input$facet_free)) ", scales = \"free_y\"" else ""))

    # ---- スケール（log/log）------------------------------------------
    if (isTRUE(input$log_x)) geom_layers <- c(geom_layers, "  scale_x_log10()")
    if (isTRUE(input$log_y)) geom_layers <- c(geom_layers, "  scale_y_log10()")

    # ---- パレット -----------------------------------------------------
    pal <- input$palette %||% "default"
    has_color <- nzchar(input$aes_color %||% "")
    has_fill  <- nzchar(input$aes_fill %||% "")
    if (pal != "default") {
      if (pal %in% c("Set1","Set2","Dark2","Paired")) {
        if (has_color) geom_layers <- c(geom_layers,
          sprintf("  scale_colour_brewer(palette = \"%s\")", pal))
        if (has_fill)  geom_layers <- c(geom_layers,
          sprintf("  scale_fill_brewer(palette = \"%s\")", pal))
      } else {
        opt <- switch(pal, viridis = "D", magma = "A", plasma = "C")
        if (has_color) geom_layers <- c(geom_layers,
          sprintf("  scale_colour_viridis_d(option = \"%s\")", opt))
        if (has_fill)  geom_layers <- c(geom_layers,
          sprintf("  scale_fill_viridis_d(option = \"%s\")", opt))
      }
    }

    # ---- coord_flip ---------------------------------------------------
    if (isTRUE(input$flip_coord))
      geom_layers <- c(geom_layers, "  coord_flip()")

    # ---- ラベル -------------------------------------------------------
    lab_args <- character()
    if (nzchar(input$plot_title    %||% ""))
      lab_args <- c(lab_args, sprintf("title = \"%s\"",    input$plot_title))
    if (nzchar(input$plot_subtitle %||% ""))
      lab_args <- c(lab_args, sprintf("subtitle = \"%s\"", input$plot_subtitle))
    if (nzchar(input$plot_xlab     %||% ""))
      lab_args <- c(lab_args, sprintf("x = \"%s\"",        input$plot_xlab))
    if (nzchar(input$plot_ylab     %||% ""))
      lab_args <- c(lab_args, sprintf("y = \"%s\"",        input$plot_ylab))
    if (length(lab_args))
      geom_layers <- c(geom_layers,
        sprintf("  labs(%s)", paste(lab_args, collapse = ", ")))

    # ---- テーマ・凡例 -------------------------------------------------
    geom_layers <- c(geom_layers,
                      sprintf("  theme_%s()", input$theme_choice %||% "minimal"))
    if (!is.null(input$legend_pos) && input$legend_pos != "right")
      geom_layers <- c(geom_layers,
        sprintf("  theme(legend.position = \"%s\")", input$legend_pos))

    # ---- レイヤを " +" で連結 -----------------------------------------
    geom_layers[-length(geom_layers)] <-
      paste0(geom_layers[-length(geom_layers)], " +")

    head_lines <- c(
      "library(ggplot2)",
      "",
      sprintf("ggplot(df, aes(%s)) +", paste(aes_parts, collapse = ", ")))
    paste(c(head_lines, geom_layers), collapse = "\n")
  })

  code_ct <- reactive({
    if (!nzchar(input$ct_row %||% "") || !nzchar(input$ct_col %||% ""))
      return("# 行変数と列変数を選んでください")
    # Quote with back-ticks only if name contains spaces / special chars
    qcol <- function(x) if (grepl("^[A-Za-z._぀-鿿][A-Za-z0-9._぀-鿿]*$", x))
                          x else sprintf("`%s`", x)
    rn <- qcol(input$ct_row); cn <- qcol(input$ct_col)
    lines <- c(
      sprintf("# クロス集計表を作る\ntab <- table(df$%s, df$%s, useNA = \"ifany\")",
               rn, cn),
      "")
    if (isTRUE(input$ct_addmargins))
      lines <- c(lines, "addmargins(tab)  # 合計を追加")
    if ((input$ct_prop %||% "row") != "none") {
      pt_arg <- switch(input$ct_prop,
        row = "tab, margin = 1",
        col = "tab, margin = 2",
        total = "tab")
      lab <- switch(input$ct_prop,
        row = "行ごと（各行の合計が 100%）",
        col = "列ごと（各列の合計が 100%）",
        total = "全体（総合計に対する比率）")
      lines <- c(lines, sprintf("\n# 比率（%s）\nround(prop.table(%s) * 100, 1)",
                                 lab, pt_arg))
    }
    if (isTRUE(input$ct_chisq))
      lines <- c(lines,
                  "\n# カイ二乗検定（独立性の検定）",
                  "# 帰無仮説 H0: 2 変数は独立（関連がない）",
                  "# p < 0.05 なら H0 を棄却 → 関連がある",
                  "chi <- chisq.test(tab)",
                  "print(chi)")
    if (isTRUE(input$ct_cramer)) {
      lines <- c(lines,
                  "",
                  "# クラメールの V（連関の強さ：0-1）",
                  "# 目安: 0.1 未満=弱い  0.1-0.3=中  0.3 以上=強い",
                  "# n が大きいと p < 0.05 でも実質的な関連は弱いことがある．V で確認．",
                  "n <- sum(tab); k <- min(nrow(tab), ncol(tab))",
                  "cramer_v <- sqrt(as.numeric(chi$statistic) / (n * (k - 1)))",
                  "cat(\"Cramer's V =\", round(cramer_v, 3), \"\\n\")")
    }
    paste(lines, collapse = "\n")
  })
  output$code_ct <- renderText(code_ct())

  output$ct_preview <- renderPrint({

    print(addmargins(tab))
  })

  code_cor <- reactive({
    if (!nzchar(input$cor_x %||% "") || !nzchar(input$cor_y %||% ""))
      return("# X と Y の変数を選んでください")
    lines <- character()

    # 外れ値除外 — テンプレ
    df_var <- "df"
    if (isTRUE(input$cor_filter_on)) {
      f_expr <- input$cor_filter_expr %||% ""
      lines <- c(lines,
        "library(dplyr)",
        "# 外れ値・特異値を除いてから相関を計算 (第7講 Q4 風)",
        sprintf("df_clean <- df %%>%% filter(%s)",
                 if (nzchar(f_expr)) f_expr else "TRUE"),
        "")
      df_var <- "df_clean"
    }

    if (isTRUE(input$cor_test))
      lines <- c(lines,
        sprintf("# 相関係数と検定\ncor.test(%s$%s, %s$%s, method = \"%s\")",
                 df_var, input$cor_x, df_var, input$cor_y, input$cor_method))

    if (isTRUE(input$cor_scatter)) {
      aes_str <- sprintf("x = %s, y = %s", input$cor_x, input$cor_y)
      if (nzchar(input$cor_color %||% ""))
        aes_str <- paste0(aes_str, sprintf(", colour = %s", input$cor_color))
      plot_lines <- c("\n# 散布図",
        "library(ggplot2)",
        sprintf("ggplot(%s, aes(%s)) +", df_var, aes_str),
        "  geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +")
      if (isTRUE(input$cor_smooth_in_plot))
        plot_lines <- c(plot_lines, "  geom_smooth(method = \"lm\") +")
      plot_lines <- c(plot_lines, "  theme_minimal()")
      lines <- c(lines, plot_lines)
    }

    # 相関行列モード — テンプレ
    if (isTRUE(input$cor_matrix_on)) {
      vars <- input$cor_matrix_vars %||% ""
      lines <- c(lines, "",
        "# ===== 相関行列 (第7講 Q5) =====",
        sprintf("vars <- c(%s)",
                 paste(sprintf("\"%s\"",
                                trimws(strsplit(vars, ",", fixed = TRUE)[[1]])),
                        collapse = ", ")),
        sprintf("cor_mat <- cor(%s[, vars], use = \"pairwise.complete.obs\")",
                 df_var),
        "round(cor_mat, 3)",
        "",
        "# 散布図行列で目視（base R）",
        sprintf("pairs(%s[, vars], pch = 19, col = rgb(0,0,0,0.3))",
                 df_var))
    }
    paste(lines, collapse = "\n")
  })
  output$code_cor <- renderText(code_cor())

  code_lm <- reactive({
    if (!nzchar(input$lm_dv %||% "") || !length(input$lm_iv))
      return("# Y と X を選んでください")
    sep <- if (isTRUE(input$lm_inter) && length(input$lm_iv) > 1)
            " * " else " + "
    # log 変換テンプレ
    use_log <- isTRUE(input$lm_log)
    dv_expr <- if (use_log) sprintf("log(%s)", input$lm_dv) else input$lm_dv
    iv_exprs <- if (use_log) sprintf("log(%s)", input$lm_iv) else input$lm_iv
    formula_str <- sprintf("%s ~ %s", dv_expr,
                            paste(iv_exprs, collapse = sep))
    extras <- input$lm_extras %||% c("summary","confint")
    lines <- c("# 線形回帰",
                if (use_log) "# log 変換 (第10講 Q2): 係数は弾力性として解釈できる" else NULL,
                sprintf("fit <- lm(%s, data = df)", formula_str), "")
    if ("summary" %in% extras)
      lines <- c(lines, "summary(fit)  # 係数・R²・F値")
    if ("confint" %in% extras)
      lines <- c(lines, "\nconfint(fit)  # 95% 信頼区間")
    if ("anova" %in% extras)
      lines <- c(lines, "\nanova(fit)    # 分散分析表")
    if ("resid" %in% extras)
      lines <- c(lines, "\n# 残差プロット",
                  "library(ggplot2)",
                  "ggplot(data.frame(fitted = fitted(fit),",
                  "                  resid = residuals(fit)),",
                  "       aes(fitted, resid)) +",
                  "  geom_point(alpha = 0.4) +",
                  "  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = 2) +",
                  "  geom_smooth(method = \"loess\", se = FALSE) +",
                  "  theme_minimal()")
    if (isTRUE(input$lm_predict)) {
      vals <- input$lm_predict_vals %||% ""
      first_iv <- input$lm_iv[1]
      lines <- c(lines, "",
        "# ===== predict() で新しい値を予測 (第10講 Q3) =====",
        "# 仮想的な X の値で Y を予測（IV が複数なら全て指定する必要あり）",
        sprintf("new_data <- data.frame(%s = c(%s))",
                 first_iv, vals),
        "predict(fit, newdata = new_data)",
        "# 信頼区間付き予測:",
        "predict(fit, newdata = new_data, interval = \"confidence\")")
    }
    paste(lines, collapse = "\n")
  })
  output$code_lm <- renderText(code_lm())

    }
    sep <- if (isTRUE(input$lm_inter) && length(input$lm_iv) > 1) " * " else " + "
    f <- as.formula(paste(input$lm_dv, "~", paste(input$lm_iv, collapse = sep)))
    fit <- tryCatch(lm(f, data = rv$df), error = function(e) NULL)
    if (!is.null(fit)) print(summary(fit))
  })

  code_tt <- reactive({
    if (!nzchar(input$tt_dv %||% ""))
      return("# 従属変数を選んでください")
    extras <- input$tt_extras %||% character(0)
    lines <- c("# t 検定")
    if (input$tt_design == "two_sample") {
      if (!nzchar(input$tt_group %||% ""))
        return("# 群分け列を選んでください")
      lines <- c(lines,
        sprintf("t.test(%s ~ %s, data = df, var.equal = %s)",
                 input$tt_dv, input$tt_group,
                 if (isTRUE(input$tt_var_equal)) "TRUE" else "FALSE"))
    } else if (input$tt_design == "paired") {
      if (!nzchar(input$tt_group %||% ""))
        return("# 群分け列を選んでください")
      lines <- c(lines,
"# 対応のある t 検定（事前に群を 2 列に整形してから）",
"# 例: pre, post 列がある場合",
sprintf("t.test(df$pre, df$post, paired = TRUE)"))
    } else {
      lines <- c(lines,
        sprintf("t.test(df$%s, mu = %s)", input$tt_dv,
                 input$tt_mu %||% 0))
    }
    if ("d" %in% extras) {
      lines <- c(lines, "\n# 効果量 Cohen's d")
      if (input$tt_design == "two_sample" && nzchar(input$tt_group %||% "")) {
        lines <- c(lines,
          "library(effectsize)  # install.packages(\"effectsize\")",
          sprintf("cohens_d(%s ~ %s, data = df)", input$tt_dv, input$tt_group))
      } else {
        lines <- c(lines, "# 1 標本・対応のある場合は手計算で（コードは省略）")
      }
    }
    if ("wilcox" %in% extras) {
      lines <- c(lines, "\n# Wilcoxon 検定（ノンパラメトリック代替）")
      if (input$tt_design == "two_sample") {
        lines <- c(lines,
          sprintf("wilcox.test(%s ~ %s, data = df, conf.int = TRUE)",
                   input$tt_dv, input$tt_group))
      } else if (input$tt_design == "paired") {
        lines <- c(lines, "wilcox.test(df$pre, df$post, paired = TRUE, conf.int = TRUE)")
      } else {
        lines <- c(lines,
          sprintf("wilcox.test(df$%s, mu = %s, conf.int = TRUE)",
                   input$tt_dv, input$tt_mu %||% 0))
      }
    }
    paste(lines, collapse = "\n")
  })
  output$code_tt <- renderText(code_tt())

  output$tt_preview <- renderPrint({
    req(rv$df, input$tt_dv)
    df <- rv$df; y <- df[[input$tt_dv]]
    out <- tryCatch({
      if (input$tt_design == "one_sample") t.test(y, mu = input$tt_mu)
      else {
        req(nzchar(input$tt_group), input$tt_group %in% names(df))
        g <- as.factor(df[[input$tt_group]])
        if (length(levels(g)) != 2) stop("群が 2 水準必要")
        y1 <- y[g == levels(g)[1]]; y2 <- y[g == levels(g)[2]]
        if (input$tt_design == "two_sample")
          t.test(y1, y2, var.equal = isTRUE(input$tt_var_equal))
        else {
          n <- min(length(y1), length(y2))
          t.test(y1[1:n], y2[1:n], paired = TRUE)
        }
      }
    }, error = function(e) NULL)
    if (!is.null(out)) print(out)
    else cat("変数を選んでください．")
  })

name: README.md
content:
# beLab-edu — R コード生成アシスタント

R 入門者のための **コード生成 GUI**．  
学生は GUI で操作 → 生成された R コードをコピー → **Google Colab に貼り付けて実行** という流れで学ぶ．

## コンセプト

> 「R 構文を覚える前に，まず GUI で動かして概念を掴む．  
>  そして生成された R コードを読んで構文を学ぶ．」

GUI は **コード生成器** であり，実行環境ではない．  
学生がプログラミングで詰まりやすい「構文・括弧・引数の順序」を肩代わりし，  
本質的な「どの分析を，何の変数で，どう解釈するか」に集中できるようにする．

## なぜ Colab を使うのか

- インストール不要・どの端末でも同じ環境
- Google アカウントだけあれば即実行
- データを Google Drive と連携できる
- ノートブック形式で結果と考察を併記しやすい

R を Colab で動かす場合，ランタイム → ランタイムのタイプを変更 → **R** を選ぶだけ．

## 9 タブ構成

| タブ | できること | 出力される R コード |
|---|---|---|
| ① データ | 組込み / CSV アップロード / URL / Drive | `read.csv()` ほか |
| ② 整形 | dplyr のテンプレ生成 | `filter / select / mutate / group_by / arrange` |
| ③ 記述統計 | 群別 mean/SD/中央値/四分位 | `summarise()` |
| ④ 可視化 | ggplot ビルダー | `ggplot() + geom_*()` |
| ⑤ クロス集計 | table + addmargins + prop.table + chisq.test | `table()` ほか |
| ⑥ 相関 | cor.test (Pearson/Spearman/Kendall) + 散布図 | `cor.test()` |
| ⑦ 回帰分析 | lm + summary + confint + 残差プロット | `lm()` |
| ⑧ t 検定 | 二群独立 / 対応のある / 1 標本 + Welch + Cohen's d + Wilcoxon | `t.test()` |
| ℹ️ 使い方 | フローと Colab 設定の手順 | — |

**AI チャットは含まない**（学生は別途 Colab・他の AI を組み合わせて使う方針）．

## 学生のフロー

1. ① データタブでデータを読み込む（組込み / CSV アップロード / URL）
2. 各タブで操作したい内容を選ぶ
3. 画面下部に R コードが自動生成される
4. **［📋 コピー］** ボタンで R コードをコピー
5. Google Colab に貼り付けて実行

## 配布方法

### A. shinylive（推奨・サーバー不要・Colab 不要）

完全にブラウザだけで動く．学生はリンクを 1 クリックするだけ．**これが本命**．

```r
install.packages("shinylive")
shinylive::export("inst/edu", "docs/edu")
# docs/edu/ を GitHub Pages にアップロード → 学生は単一 URL でアクセス
```

`inst/edu/app.R` は **shiny / bslib / dplyr / ggplot2 / DT** のみ依存（shinylive
50MB 制限内）．サーバー運用不要・常時無料．

### B. Google Colab で beLab-edu 自体を動かす

「学生に Colab だけで完結させたい」場合．Shiny サーバーを Colab セルから起動し，
`localtunnel` で公開 URL を作る．

> **⚠️ 注意**: shinylive の方が圧倒的にラク．Colab で動かすのは「ngrok の代替を
> 使えるか」「URL が毎回変わる」「12 時間で切断」など制約が多い．
> 演習用に一時的に動かすのには使える．

#### Colab セル 1: ランタイムを R にする
ランタイム → ランタイムのタイプを変更 → **R** を選択．

#### Colab セル 2: パッケージ導入
```r
install.packages(c("shiny","bslib","ggplot2","dplyr","DT"))
```

#### Colab セル 3: app.R を取得
```r
download.file(
  "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/<USER>/<REPO>/main/inst/edu/app.R",
  "app.R")
```
（ローカルから直接アップロードする場合は左サイドバーから `app.R` をドロップ）

#### Colab セル 4: 公開トンネル起動（バックグラウンド）
```r
# localtunnel は Node 製・登録不要．Colab のシェル経由で起動．
system("npm install -g localtunnel", intern = FALSE)
system("nohup lt --port 4848 > lt.log 2>&1 &")
Sys.sleep(3)
cat(readLines("lt.log"), sep = "\n")  # https://xxxx.loca.lt が表示される
```

#### Colab セル 5: Shiny を起動
```r
shiny::runApp("app.R", host = "0.0.0.0", port = 4848,
               launch.browser = FALSE)
```
セル 4 で表示された `https://xxxx.loca.lt` をブラウザで開く．  
初回アクセス時に loca.lt の警告ページが出る場合は，Colab で表示される
グローバル IP をパスワード欄に貼って通過．

> 何が起きるか:  
> Colab のサーバー (R Shiny) → localtunnel → 学生のブラウザ．  
> Colab セル 5 はブロッキング実行され，runtime が生きている間だけ URL が有効．

### C. shinyapps.io（無料枠）

```r
rsconnect::deployApp("inst/edu", appName = "belab-edu")
```

無料枠は月 25 時間まで．~10〜20 名の少人数クラスなら問題なし．

### D. ローカル起動（手元の R 環境で）

```r
# 単体ファイル版（shinylive と同じ）
shiny::runApp("inst/edu", port = 4848)

# パッケージ版（フル機能 edu UI）
pkgload::load_all("/path/to/beLab")
beLab::run_app_edu()  # port 4848
```

## どれを選ぶか

| 状況 | 推奨 |
|---|---|
| 大人数の講義・全員に配るだけ | **A. shinylive + GitHub Pages** |
| Colab だけで完結させたい・PC 不要 | B.（一時的・URL は毎回変わる） |
| 教員が運用管理する（〜20 名） | C. shinyapps.io |
| 自分の Mac/PC で個別演習 | D. ローカル起動 |

## なぜ Colab 単体ではなく GUI を併用するのか

Colab だけで R を学ばせると：
- 構文エラー（括弧・カンマ・引数順）でつまずく
- 「何ができるか」のメニューが見えず，自由作文になる
- パイプ `|>` や `%>%`，`tidy evaluation` に最初から触れさせると重い

GUI が **メニューと R コードの対応** を見せることで，学生は  
「やりたい操作 → R 構文」のマッピングを，自然に体得できる．

## 想定する典型的な使い方

### 平均と標準偏差の比較

1. ① データ → `iris` を選ぶ
2. ③ 記述統計 → 変数 `Sepal.Length`, 群分け `Species`, mean / sd / n
3. 生成された `summarise()` コードを Colab にコピペして実行
4. 結果を解釈

### t 検定と効果量

1. ① データ → CSV をアップロード
2. ⑧ t 検定 → デザイン `二群（独立）`, DV `score`, 群 `condition`,
   Welch + Cohen's d
3. 生成コード（`t.test() + cohens_d()`）を Colab に貼って実行
4. p 値・95% CI・d を読み解く

### 散布図 + 相関 + 回帰

1. ⑥ 相関 → X `Petal.Length`, Y `Sepal.Length`, 回帰直線あり
2. ⑦ 回帰分析 → DV `Sepal.Length`, IV `Petal.Length`
3. 両方を「マイコード」に保存 → ipynb で Colab に持っていって実行
